notes: Open-source consortium developing decentralized-identity standards (DIDs, Verifiable Credentials, DIDComm). Working-group outputs are mostly free / open-source; specifications are typically Apache 2.0 or W3C-licensed.

match_nodes.description: DID Methods and related DIF specifications

data.official_name: DIF DID Methods + DIDComm + Verifiable Credentials specifications
data.notes: Free / open-source. DIF working groups produce specifications under permissive licenses.
